heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 7110 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 409 and is classified to .section 410 of Pub. L. 100–533section 7109 of this title

Amendments2000— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text authorized appropriations to carry out this chapter for fiscal years 1998 through 2000 and limited obligation or expenditure of those funds prior to the budget review by the Council for that fiscal year.Pub. L. 106–5541997— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated for each of fiscal years 1995 through 1997, to carry out this chapter, $350,000.”Pub. L. 105–135

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter $1,000,000, for each of fiscal years 2001 through 2003, of which $550,000 shall be available in each such fiscal year to carry out .section 7109 of this title

children.heading: Budget review
children.label: b Budget review
children.text: No amount made available under this section for any fiscal year may be obligated or expended by the Council before the date on which the Council reviews and approves the operating budget of the Council to carry out the responsibilities of the Council for that fiscal year.
